_meta.description: Labeled seed corpus for the email action-item extraction quality eval (#1605 feature, #1949 tracking). Each case is one email whose body is hand-labeled with the action items the recipient (the principal) should actually take. Scored by gaia.eval.action_item_quality: the agent extracts action items locally (Lemonade), and the extracted set is matched against 'expected_action_items' with fuzzy-primary matching (an optional LLM judge only resolves borderline pairs). The aggregate precision / recall / F1 are compared to action_items_gate_thresholds.json in report mode. HARD NEGATIVES (expected_action_items == []) are deliberate: an email with no real task must extract nothing, and any extraction there is a false positive in the precision denominator -- the case unit tests miss most often. Expected items use the REAL ActionItem shape from gaia_agent_email.contract.ActionItem (description / due_hint / type / url); ground truth carries only what a human can confidently label from the body.

case_schema.scenario: str -- short label for what this email is
case_schema.is_hard_negative: bool -- true when the email has no real action items (expected_action_items is empty)
case_schema.email: {from: str, subject: str, body: str} -- the email being triaged
case_schema.expected_action_items: list[{description: str, due_hint?: str, type: 'text'|'link', url?: str}] -- the actions a careful human labels; matched on 'description' (fuzzy). Empty for hard negatives.

email.subject: Design review time change
email.body:
Hey Sam,

Can we move Thursday's design review from 1pm to 3pm? Rachel has a conflict at the earlier time. Just let me know if that works for you.

Dana

expected_action_items.description: Reply to Dana confirming whether the 3pm Thursday design review time works

ai-002.scenario: two distinct actions in one email

email.subject: Onboarding flow + pricing typo
email.body:
Sam,

Two things before Friday: (1) please review the new onboarding flow I shared Monday and send feedback, and (2) the pricing page still says $19 instead of $29 -- can you fix that or ping whoever owns it?

Thanks,
Marcus

expected_action_items.description: Review the new onboarding flow and send Marcus feedback
Fix the pricing page typo ($19 should be $29) or escalate to the page owner

ai-003.scenario: link action -- form to fill out

email.subject: Benefits enrollment closes June 30
email.body:
Hi all,

Open enrollment ends June 30. You must confirm or change your benefits selections in Workday before then, or your current elections roll over automatically. Complete the enrollment form here: https://workday.acme.io/enroll

People Ops

expected_action_items.description: Confirm or change benefits selections in the Workday enrollment form

email.subject: Invoice #4471 due
email.body:
Dear customer,

Invoice #4471 for $1,240.00 is due on July 15. Please remit payment by the due date to avoid a late fee. You can pay online at https://cloudhost.com/pay/4471.

CloudHost Billing

email.subject: Quarterly planning Wed 10am
email.body:
Hi team,

Reminder that quarterly planning is Wednesday at 10am. Before the meeting, please add your top three priorities to the shared planning doc so we can group them. Thanks!

Priya

expected_action_items.description: Add your top three priorities to the shared planning doc before the meeting

email.subject: PTO approval needed
email.body:
Hi,

I've requested PTO for August 4-8 in the HR system. Could you approve it when you get a chance? I'd like to book flights this week.

Tom

expected_action_items.description: Approve Tom's PTO request for August 4-8 in the HR system

email.subject: Licensing agreement -- signature
email.body:
Dear Ms. Chen,

The licensing agreement is finalized. Please review the attached document and return a signed copy by Thursday, 12 June, so we can proceed to filing.

Regards,
Robert Alvarez

expected_action_items.description: Review the finalized licensing agreement and return a signed copy

email.subject: Customer escalation follow-ups
email.body:
Sam,

After today's call with Northwind: please schedule a follow-up demo for next week, send them the updated SLA one-pager, and forward the ticket thread to the support lead so they have context. Let me know once these are done.

Elena

expected_action_items.description: Schedule a follow-up demo with Northwind for next week
Send Northwind the updated SLA one-pager
Forward the ticket thread to the support lead

email.subject: Team offsite -- headcount
email.body:
Hi everyone,

We're finalizing catering for the offsite. Please RSVP yes/no by Friday so we can confirm numbers. Reply to this email with your answer.

Events Team

expected_action_items.description: RSVP yes or no to the team offsite

ai-010.scenario: bug report needing action + info request

email.subject: Login regression on staging
email.body:
Hi Sam,

We're seeing a login regression on staging since this morning's deploy. Can you investigate and let us know root cause? Also, could you share which commit went out in that deploy?

QA

expected_action_items.description: Investigate the staging login regression and report the root cause
Share which commit shipped in this morning's deploy

email.subject: Action required: reset your password
email.body:
Your password will expire in 3 days. To keep your account active, reset it now: https://sso.acme.io/reset. If you do not reset it, you will be locked out.

Acme Security

expected_action_items.description: Reset your account password before it expires

ai-012.scenario: scheduling with a proposed slot to confirm

email.subject: Intro call
email.body:
Hi Sam,

Great to connect. I'm free Tuesday 2pm or Thursday 11am for the intro call -- can you confirm which works and I'll send an invite?

Grace

expected_action_items.description: Confirm whether Tuesday 2pm or Thursday 11am works for the intro call with Grace

email.subject: Q2 expenses close soon
email.body:
Reminder: submit any outstanding Q2 expense reports by end of day June 28. Reports submitted after the cutoff will be processed in Q3.

Finance

email.subject: This week in Acme: 5 product updates
email.body:
Hi there,

Here's what shipped this week: dark mode, faster search, a new dashboard, CSV export, and mobile push. Read the full changelog on our blog. Thanks for being a customer!

The Acme Team

ai-neg-002.scenario: hard negative -- FYI status update, no ask

email.subject: Deploy went out cleanly
email.body:
Hi all,

Just letting you know the 2.4 release deployed to production this afternoon with no issues. Metrics look normal. No action needed -- sharing for visibility.

Priya

email.subject: Your order #88213 has shipped
email.body:
Thanks for your order! Your package shipped today and should arrive by Thursday. No action is needed on your part; we'll email you when it's delivered.

ShopMart

email.subject: Thanks!
email.body:
Hi Sam,

Just wanted to say thanks for the great demo yesterday -- the team was impressed. No need to reply, just wanted to pass along the kind words.

Grace

email.subject: 48-hour flash sale inside
email.body:
Our biggest sale of the summer is here! Up to 60% off everything. Shop now before it's gone. Unsubscribe anytime at the link below.

GadgetZone

email.subject: Accepted: Weekly sync
email.body:
Marcus Lee has accepted your invitation to Weekly sync on Monday 9:00am. This is an automated notification.

Acme Calendar

email.subject: Photos from the weekend
email.body:
Hi honey,

Attaching a few photos from Sunday's picnic -- everyone had such a nice time. Hope work isn't too crazy. Love you!

Mom
